rag_rules: Fix unresolved references by ensuring all identifiers are declared or visible in the same annex scope before use.
Validate that all AGREE expressions have valid types; resolve '<error>' type issues by correcting root reference or removing invalid clauses.
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or helper declarations within the same annex for AGREE contracts.
Ensure AGREE scalar types match AADL expectations: int, real, bool for constants and equations.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Guarantees should relate visible inputs to outputs using valid boolean expressions.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports or undefined identifiers in component type annexes.
Avoid using invalid or unresolved identifiers in guarantee expressions that cause '<error>' types.
